instructions: Close issue #5. It is a confirmed duplicate of issue #2. Add a comment explaining it is a duplicate before closing.

issues.title: Login endpoint returns 500 on malformed JWT
issues.body: When sending a malformed JWT token to /api/login, the server returns a 500 Internal Server Error instead of a 401 Unauthorized. Stack trace attached.

issues.title: Server error when sending bad auth token
issues.body: Sending an invalid token to the login endpoint causes a server crash. This seems like the same issue reported earlier.

eval_criteria.description: A comment was added to issue #5 mentioning it is a duplicate
